mapper.select: SELECT f.follow_id, f.user_id, f.workshop_id, f.active, w.profile_img, w.name FROM follow f LEFT JOIN workshop w ON f.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND f.active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND active = TRUE
SELECT * FROM follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND workshop_id = #{workshopId}
SELECT workshop_id FROM follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND active = 1
SELECT w.workshop_id AS workshopId, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.category ORDER BY p.category SEPARATOR ',') AS categories FROM workshop w JOIN program p USING (workshop_id) GROUP BY w.workshop_id;
